attempt_local_note: Fifth bounded repair in the attempt-local B -> C1 -> C2 -> C3 -> C4 -> C5 lineage. C5 also adds six fixture-scoped known-FP declarations to the plugin-root _known_false_positives.yaml (shared config, not a historical review artifact). Same minimal honest artifact set as C1-C4.

changes.label: floating polymer cantilever (Panel F)
changes.change: up 0.24 cm; anchor=east, x=1.415 unchanged (C3 left-frame win preserved), text unchanged

measured_geometry_cm.method: pdftotext -bbox word boxes + pdfplumber path/line/curve extraction. Bottom-row calibration global_x_pt = 28.3468*global_cm + 4.344; panel_y = (457.75 - pt_top)/28.3468.

probe.crossing_path: probe horizontal wire at panel-y 3.042; sample rect top at panel-y 2.78 (below)
probe.note: the wire-to-rect gap is only 0.26 cm, so a 0.155 cm-tall label with descenders centers at ~0.05 cm each side (below the 0.08 guideline but collision-free: no text_on_path finding).

floating_polymer_cantilever.obstacles: trapped-charge sphere at panelF x[1.078,1.242] y[1.100,1.264] on 'er'; cantilever beam passing behind the word
floating_polymer_cantilever.requirement: preserve C3 left-frame clearance >= 0.10 cm (met, x unchanged); clear the sphere and beam (met)

false_positive_declarations.scope: fixture fig1_updated_agent_redraw_v1, glyph-scoped, tight dark/edge bounds, per-entry ground text
false_positive_declarations.ground: orchestrator crop review confirmed no real collision (bold title/letter own-glyph halo near the thin frame line; Vs meter label separated from its box border)

compile.strict_detail: check_visual_clash --strict --ignore-known-fp: 0 blocking, 27 report-only, 6 suppressed. undeclared_geometry 0. First time strict passes across the entire B..C5 lineage. This is a MACHINE-VALID layer only; not visual, human-development, release, or publication acceptance.

boundary_coverage.verdict: unchanged at 2 (Panel F grounded source return pair, declared permanently open). The 3 label moves did not regress any frame clearance.

human_review.note: Step 10: orchestrator issues the C5 development verdict under delegation (recorded separately). strict first-green is a machine-valid layer only; publication_acceptance not_claimed.
